spec_source: manual plan based on Monarch Money browser GraphQL behavior
description: Use Monarch Money account balances, tags, transactions, cashflow summaries, and explicit transaction CRUD workflows from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Guarded GraphQL query runner
novel_features.description: Runs custom read-only Monarch Money GraphQL query files and refuses files that contain GraphQL mutations.

novel_features.name: Dry-run transaction CRUD
novel_features.description: Creates, updates, tags, and deletes individual transactions through explicit commands that dry-run by default and require --yes to apply.
